examples: "Come, Bill, you know me; you know an old shipmate, Bill, surely," said the stranger.
She asked him if it was true and he said it was true, but she knew him too well to question and his old shipmate had left the town.
She was last seen in the Shipmate pub in Middlesbrough town centre on 24 September 2000.
The shipmate added that he stabbed the pirate in the hand and tied him up.
